name: field-voice
subtitle: Vendor-neutral communication calibrator for professional writing
shortDescription: Rewrite rough or AI-sounding professional communication into authentic, client-safe, channel-ready messages without inventing facts.
longDescription: Field Voice helps client-facing advisors, account owners, technical specialists, managers, executives, and operators turn rough drafts, meeting notes, AI-generated copy, and over-polished text into credible communication that sounds like a real person. It supports customer emails, executive briefs, chat replies, LinkedIn posts, deck copy, customer meeting follow-ups, manager updates, and technical explanations while preserving facts, citations, product names, commitments, and intent.
category: Productivity / Communication / Sales and Customer Success

features.name: Field Voice Presets
features.description: One-line presets bundle mode, role lens, rewrite strength, citation behavior, detail policy, and credibility controls.

features.name: Source-Locked Credibility Mode
features.description: Improves tone without adding, removing, or altering facts, claims, citations, product names, owners, timelines, or commitments.

features.name: Personal voice profiles
features.description: Uses a writing sample or saved profile so rewrites sound more like the individual.

features.name: Channel-specific modes
features.description: Supports customer email, executive brief, chat reply, LinkedIn post, deck copy, customer follow-up, manager update, technical explanation, personal note, and public announcement.

features.name: Citation and commitment handling
features.description: Preserves provided citations, flags missing support, and checks for accidental commitments.

dataHandling.summary: Transforms user-provided text inside Clawpilot. The skill itself does not store data, call external services, or send outbound messages.
privacyRules: Do not invent customer details, facts, citations, metrics, sources, or commitments.
Preserve confidentiality for customer, partner, employee, email, calendar, chat, meeting, and document-derived content.
Draft only unless the user explicitly requests and confirms an outbound action through the host assistant.

samplePrompts:
/field-voice

Preset: Executive brief

Turn this into a crisp update with status, signal, risk, ask, and next step. Do not add facts.

[paste notes]

/field-voice

Profile: [paste profile or profile name]
Preset: Decision ask
Make it a little warmer.

[paste draft]
